title: Sub Item Time Entries on Same Day/Time
excerpt: Current functionality will not allow two board members to enter time tracking for the same day and time on a given subitem. Normal project workflow allows for two employees to be working on a task at the same time. If th…

posts.author: tfostersit (Traci Foster)
posts.cookedHtml: Current functionality will not allow two board members to enter time tracking for the same day and time on a given subitem. Normal project workflow allows for two employees to be working on a task at the same time. If they both work from 8am-10am, they cannot both enter time on that subitem for the same date and time. One will have to select a different timeframe. When users are working multiple tasks in one day, this can be tedious to work around as you can also not enter time on the same day/time as you did for another subitem. I would like to request Monday.com allow different users to enter time tracking for the same day and time as this would coincide with a normal workflow for projects.
